system.description:
Fire is a useful tool of destruction, but It can be used in other ways. At 3rd level, choose one of the following features.

Flame Extinction

You can extinguish any nonmagical flame within 60 feet as an action. For magical flames, this functions like dispel magic, using Constitution for the check if needed. You can use this on magic effects up to the maximum spell level you can cast.

Flame Sight

You can perceive through flames. As an action, choose a flame within 30 feet per Constitution modifier; for 1 minute, you can see and hear from its location as though you were there. You can also speak through a flame in range. You gain an expertise die on Persuasion or Deception.

Living Furnace

Choose a skill. You can use Constitution in place of the usual ability modifier for that skill. Additionally, you can cast any Fire Lord spells through a nonmagical fire within 30 feet as if you were standing there.
